summary: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience designing and developing scalable web applications for enterprise environments. Skilled in delivering ERP, fleet management, and legal operations platforms, with strong expertise in backend engineering, API architecture, performance optimization, and cloud-based deployment.

highlights: Working on the Government ERP system with secure and enterprise workflow management.
Building AI Sass management platform for structured legal operations.
Improving scalability through modular architecture and performance optimization.
Built backend architecture for BusBooking APP platforms with scalable Rest APIs and service-oriented integrations.
Integrated AWS CloudFront CDN for optimized media and video delivery pipelines.
Improved application performance with ElasticSearch, Algolia, and Redis.
